creator: sasamotikomi@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to Jean-Sébastien Pédron from comment #6)
> An additional comment: we are experimenting with Git for the xorg-dev
> repository. One of the advantages is an easier access for end-user to the
> development ports, IMHO.
> 
> See:
> http://blogs.freebsdish.org/graphics/2014/10/19/migrating-xorg-dev-to-git/

I understand it, but why not just back WITH_NEW_XORG options with modern xorg (1.16.x) modern driver such (xf86-video-ati-7.5.0) and modern MESA(10.X) for 10.x only or 9.3 too(radeon user), because correctly NEW_XORG repos is useless and old kernel EoL in 2016.
